articles.title: Explained: Why global brokerages are hitting panic button on India. FII exodus, oil shock ringing alarm?
articles.description: Equity market has shifted sharply from optimism to crisis mode, marked by a record $13 billion FII outflow in March—the worst ever. The sell-off has been driven by a surge in oil prices following Gulf tensions, with Brent crude jumping over 50%, worsening inflation, trade deficits, and corporate margins. Existing weaknesses like a weak rupee, sluggish earnings, high valuations, and global trade pressures have compounded the impact, turning investor sentiment from an “India premium” to an “India exit.”

articles.description: Mr. Singh also flagged 89 pending faculty promotion cases at JNU, of which 62 had exceeded the stipulated processing period, saying the delays were affecting career progression and PhD supervision capacity.

topStories.title: ‘BJP loot diwas’: Congress slams price hike of essential commodities
topStories.description: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge said while the common citizens are hoping for relief, the BJP leadership remains entirely focused on "looting the public and plundering the nation amidst this crisis"

topStories.title: SIR in Bengal: 47 lakh objections disposed of till March 31, Calcutta HC Chief Justice informs Supreme Court
topStories.description: A Bench led by Chief Justice Surya Kant said they were apprised that by April 7, all objections will be decided

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 33 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: Trump says US could leave Iran war in 2-3 weeks without a deal; Iran’s FM Araghchi says he has no faith in talks.

topStories.title: Oil slides 4% to below $100/bbl as Middle East uncertainty keeps markets on edge
topStories.description: Oil prices experienced a significant drop of over 4% as Middle East tensions continued to influence markets, despite indications of a potential easing of the U.S.-Iran conflict. Investors locked in gains amid uncertainty, with analysts noting that even if the conflict ends, supply chain normalization and infrastructure damage will likely keep prices elevated.

topStories.title: President Trump ‘deeply cares’ about India-US relationship, says ambassador Sergio Gor
topStories.description: Last week, PM Modi and Trump held the first phone call since the beginning of the Iran war and discussed the situation in the Gulf region.

topStories.title: Breakthrough or escalation? Donald Trump to announce ‘important’ Iran War update tomorrow — what to expect
topStories.description: On Tuesday, Trump told reporters in White House that the military could end its Iran offensive in two to three weeks and would shift responsibility for the Strait of Hormuz to countries that rely on it for oil and shipping.

topStories.title: Megan Thee Stallion taken to hospital during Moulin Rouge performance
topStories.description: The rapper "started feeling very ill" mid-way through the show in New York, her representative told US media.

topStories.title: Visa, immigration changes in April 2026: US, UK, Canada, EU tighten rules - Business Standard
topStories.description: Visa, immigration changes in April 2026: US, UK, Canada, EU tighten rules  Business Standard

topStories.title: Donald Trump’s approval rating drops to -17; Even Republicans losing faith?
topStories.description: President Trump's approval rating has dropped to -17, marking the lowest point of his second term and the weakest for any US president. A recent poll shows 33% approval, while 62% disapprove, indicating rising discontent with his administration's actions.

topStories.title: American journalist kidnapped in Baghdad

dailyNews.title: Kristi Noem ‘devastated’ by story about her husband’s online activities
dailyNews.description: A former CIA officer warns Kristi Noem may have been a blackmail risk after the Daily Mail reported on her husband Bryon's alleged secret fetish life.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin unlawfully terminated legal status of migrants who used Biden-era app, judge rules
dailyNews.description: A federal judge ruled the Trump administration unlawfully ended parole status for migrants who used the CBP One app, and ordered DHS to reverse the move.

dailyNews.title: Alabama Gov Kay Ivey hospitalized following minor procedure, says she is determined to make speedy recovery
dailyNews.description: Alabama Gov. Kay Ivey, 81, was hospitalized after undergoing a minor procedure to remove fluid that was pressing on her lung, her office said on Tuesday.

dailyNews.title: Marco Rubio warns Iran wanted to be the 'next North Korea' as he sees 'finish line' in conflict
dailyNews.description: Marco Rubio says the U.S. can 'see the finish line' in the Iran conflict, warning Tehran was pursuing intercontinental missiles and aimed to become the next North Korea.

dailyNews.title: Florida Supreme Court keeps ex-cop's execution on hold after DNA test fails to give a clear answer
dailyNews.description: Florida's Supreme Court denied a request to lift James Duckett's execution stay after DNA testing of key evidence came back inconclusive Friday.

dailyNews.title: Raiders coach Klint Kubiak favors veteran QB, hesitant to start rookie early in season
dailyNews.description: Fernando Mendoza could land in Las Vegas after the 2026 NFL Draft, but the incoming rookie quarterback may not start in Week 1, coach Klint Kubiak hinted.

dailyNews.title: Browns' Todd Monken explains reason behind missing NFL head coach group photo
dailyNews.description: The Cleveland Browns' Todd Monken missed the NFL head coaches group photo in Phoenix this week due to a haircut mix-up, which he thought he had timed perfectly.

dailyNews.title: Rogan warns of US ‘population collapse’ due to toxic chemicals and delayed parenthood tank birth rates
dailyNews.description: Joe Rogan warns of a U.S. population collapse, citing endocrine-disrupting chemicals in plastics and food as a key driver of declining fertility, alongside delayed parenthood.

dailyNews.title: Wisconsin mother stabs teen daughter to death to 'protect' her from Elon Musk: authorities
dailyNews.description: A Wisconsin mother allegedly stabbed her 14-year-old daughter to death, telling police she did it to protect the girl from tech executive Elon Musk.

dailyNews.title: Contributor for far-left outlet calls for 'wiping out Israel,' says Israelis 'mustn't feel safe'
dailyNews.description: A contributor for the far-left outlet Drop Site News called for "wiping out Israel" and called Israelis "terrorist parasites" who "must be removed from our planet" in an Instagram post.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs executive order overhauling mail-in voting in major election integrity push
dailyNews.description: Trump signed an executive order targeting mail-in voting and voter eligibility, directing agencies to compile citizenship lists and add USPS tracking.

dailyNews.title: Man charged in 'particularly heinous' killing of DC resident found bound and set on fire in ritzy area: police
dailyNews.description: Rico Rashaad Barnes was arrested in the robbery-murder of Syed Hammad Hussain, whose D.C. apartment was allegedly ransacked and set ablaze after his death.

dailyNews.description: The White House said the president would address the nation about Iran on Wednesday evening.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Halted Nuclear Threat From Iran, Despite Evidence to the Contrary
dailyNews.description: For the second time in recent days, President Trump declared that one of the key objectives of the war had been accomplished.

dailyNews.title: Trump Seeks to Redefine ‘Regime Change’ in Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump and his aides have made contradictory statements on whether the United States and Israel have transformed the Iranian government through violence.

dailyNews.title: Backdoor Funding of Homeland Security Agency Could Weaken Congress Anew
dailyNews.description: An emerging Republican plan to skirt a Democratic filibuster and fund an entire department without congressional appropriations would be the latest example of surrendering power to the White House.

dailyNews.title: Padma Lakshmi: The Decision That Would Create a Permanent American Underclass
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to take away a fundamental American promise.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Colbert Blames ‘The Bachelorette’ Cancellation for $4 Gas
dailyNews.description: The “Late Show” host joked that “Trump attacked Iran” after ABC scrapped the reality show’s latest season.

dailyNews.title: Trump to address nation on Iran war Wednesday night, White House says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said he expected that U.S. military forces will leave Iran in "two or three weeks."

dailyNews.title: Oil prices plunge below $100 in volatile trading after Trump war exit comments
dailyNews.description: Crude prices dropped on Wednesday as President Donald Trump signaled willingness to exit the Iran conflict even as the Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed.

dailyNews.title: Europe stocks set for strong rebound as Trump says Iran war will end in weeks
South Korea's Kospi leads rebound in Asia markets as Trump says Iran war could end in weeks
dailyNews.description: On Tuesday stateside, Trump said the U.S. could leave Iran in "two or three weeks," adding "We leave because there's no reason for us to do this."

dailyNews.title: Trump signs executive order limiting mail-in voting ahead of 2026 U.S. elections
dailyNews.description: Trump has put pressure on Congress to pass the SAVE America Act, a measure that would require photo identification and proof of U.S. citizenship to vote.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods says he is seeking treatment after DUI rollover crash in Florida
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump, whose former daughter-in-law Vanessa Trump is dating Woods, told The New York Post that Woods "lives a life of pain."

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth lifts suspension of Kid Rock Army helicopter flyby crews after Trump comments
dailyNews.description: Kid Rock is a prominent supporter of President Donald Trump and performed at the 2024 Republican National Convention.
